description: Required template variables for each PredictIQ email template. This file is the source-of-truth for startup validation and unit tests.

newsletter_confirmation.description: Sent when a user subscribes to the newsletter and must confirm their address.

variable_descriptions.confirm_url: Full confirmation URL including token query parameter
variable_descriptions.email: Subscriber email address shown in the email body

waitlist_confirmation.description: Sent when a user joins the launch waitlist.

variable_descriptions.email: User email address shown in the confirmation message

contact_form_auto_response.description: Auto-response sent when a user submits the contact form.

variable_descriptions.name: User's display name from the contact form
variable_descriptions.subject: Subject line the user entered in the contact form
variable_descriptions.message: Full message body the user submitted

welcome_email.description: Sent when a new user account is created.

variable_descriptions.name: User's display name
variable_descriptions.dashboard_url: Absolute URL to the user dashboard
variable_descriptions.help_url: Absolute URL to the help centre
variable_descriptions.unsubscribe_url: Absolute URL to the newsletter unsubscribe endpoint
